title: pelargonium × littleanum
intro: Pelargonium × littleanum, also known as Little-leaf Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium linifolium. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Pelargonium × littleanum include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and providing relief from digestive issues such as diarrhea and ulcers. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
